items.name_cn:
💰
Y's 2024 Spring/Summer New Mini Tote
This mini tote is from the NEW SHAPE series! It uses new craftsmanship and smooth, soft calfskin. The leather is heat-pressed for a glossy, silky finish! The fan-shaped appearance and cut-out handle design make it stylish and exquisite! The bag features a versatile, avant-garde structure with two openings, allowing for both hand and crossbody/shoulder wear, perfectly adapting to any style you desire!
Model: 791069
Size: 29x19.5x10cm

specs.rawTitle:

items.name_cn:
💰
Monogram college
The classic messenger bag!!!
A messenger bag, as the name implies, is the bag carried by mail carriers when delivering newspapers and letters. Bags similar to those carried by mail carriers are collectively referred to as messenger bags. When mentioning messenger bags, this one from Y must be on the list!
Size: 24x17x6.5cm
Model: 392737

items.name_cn:
💰
New Sade hobo is here!
Black lambskin material, super soft and smooth 😎 Rhombus quilted lambskin HOBO bag LECASSANDRE. This versatile fashion handbag comes with a folding top handle and a detachable shoulder strap, offering multiple carrying ways. Equipped with a thin long chain. A small bag that fits a phone completely, can be carried by hand or crossbody, so exquisite!
 Shoulder strap length: 55cm
Model: 793608 [Original Leather]
Size: 19x21x4cm

items.name_cn:
💰
LE5 À 7 BABY Soft Grained Calfskin
The BABY version of the refined grained deer leather handbag. Features leather buckle closure. This bag has a soft structure, matching suede lining, and is lightweight and feminine. It includes an internal card holder and comes with an adjustable shoulder strap, suitable for both hand and shoulder carry~ The perfect choice for a light summer mini bag!
Size: 15×16x7CM
Model: 809461

items.name_cn:
💰
ys1 Jamie 4.3 large pochon Suede Shoulder Bag
The designer really understands what consumers need, doesn't they?
Many tote bag designs fail to balance aesthetics and practicality.
But! This tote does it!
It is lightweight, spacious, and elegant!
It is a practical tote with on-point design and a luxurious feel.
I think it looks better than the 22bag.
Is it okay to say that 😝
It is also a mommy bag that allows you to be elegant while taking care of your baby~
34×27×3cm
Model: 809824

🔥 Raffia Weave Brown/Gold
The newly released Oxalis woven shoulder bag is the perfect choice for vacation and play. Made with raffia woven into a mesh texture, the cutout style creates a lightweight, see-through visual effect while adding a touch of sophistication! Paired with a double-layer leather shoulder strap, the iconic gold metal hardware in the center becomes the highlight 👍
Model: 781289 [Original Leather]
Size: 37x40x3cm
